prompt: Create a portrait vertical video for Instagram story: big bold headline 'Summer Sale 2024' with subtitle '50% off everything' on a vibrant orange gradient. Fade-in animation.
Make a vertical mobile-friendly video listing 5 tips: Wake up early, Exercise daily, Read 30 minutes, Meditate, Plan your day. Title: 'Morning Routine'. Use checkmark bullets with green accent.
TikTok-style portrait video showing the number 2.5 million with suffix followers, label 'Community Growth', green upward trend +340%. Count-up animation on dark background.
Instagram story quote: 'The only way to do great work is to love what you do.' by Steve Jobs. Large decorative quote marks, blue accent, typewriter effect.
Vertical reel comparing Free vs Pro plan side by side: Free has '5 projects, Basic support, 1GB storage', Pro has 'Unlimited projects, Priority support, 100GB storage'. Slide-in animation.
Portrait video showing a 5-step recipe: Prep Ingredients, Mix Batter, Preheat Oven, Bake 25 min, Cool and Serve. Arrow connectors, progressive animation, title 'Perfect Brownies'.
Vertical story video with a bar chart showing weekly workout minutes: Mon=45, Tue=30, Wed=60, Thu=0, Fri=50, Sat=90, Sun=40. Title: 'This Week's Activity'. Grow animation.
Mobile vertical video: pie chart showing time spent today — Work 40%, Sleep 33%, Exercise 7%, Leisure 12%, Commute 8%. Title 'Daily Breakdown'. Donut style, spin animation.
Square Instagram post video: headline 'New Product Launch' with subtitle 'Available now worldwide' on a dark navy gradient. Scale-pop entrance.
1:1 square video comparing Node.js vs Deno: Node has 'NPM ecosystem, Mature tooling, Huge community', Deno has 'Built-in TypeScript, Secure by default, Modern APIs'. VS badge in center.
Square format: big number 99.97 with percent suffix, label 'Uptime SLA', context 'Industry-leading reliability across all regions'. Green up trend +0.02%. Scale-pop animation.
Square Instagram video: 4 feature cards in a 2x2 grid — 'Fast' with lightning icon, 'Secure' with lock icon, 'Reliable' with shield icon, 'Simple' with star icon. Slide-up animation, dark background.
Widescreen 16:9 video showing company timeline: 2019 Founded, 2020 First Product, 2021 Series A, 2022 Global Launch, 2023 IPO. Title 'Our Journey'. Progressive animation, blue dots.

16:9 landscape video: world map showing data centers in Virginia (20,38), Frankfurt (48,28), Mumbai (65,45), Tokyo (82,35). Title 'Global Infrastructure'. Pulse markers, connection lines, dark background.
Vertical story sequence: first show hero text 'Introducing Flux', then display 3 feature cards showing Speed, Security, and Scale with icons, then end with a stat counter showing 10000 beta signups.

Portrait mobile video sequence: start with section title 'Weekly Health Report', then a bar chart of steps per day Mon through Sun (8K 6K 10K 7K 12K 15K 9K), then a data callout showing 67000 total steps with upward trend.

Square video sequence: begin with hero 'Why Choose Us?', then a comparison of Us vs Competitors side by side with 3 points each, then close with a quote 'Best tool we have ever used' by Jamie Lee, CTO.

Widescreen 16:9 sequence: first a hero title 'Product Roadmap 2024', then a timeline showing Q1 Research, Q2 Design, Q3 Build, Q4 Launch, then a pie chart of budget allocation Design 25% Engineering 50% Marketing 15% Operations 10%.
Vertical mobile dashboard: stat counter showing 3.2M downloads on the top half, and a pie chart showing platform split iOS 55% Android 38% Other 7% on the bottom half.
Square format composite: bar chart of quarterly revenue on the left and a stat counter showing 12.4M annual revenue on the right, dark gradient background.
